news.t: It's Rough Out There. But These 5 Funds Are Crushing It.
GQG Partners Selects SEI's Advisors' Inner Circle Fund to Launch First ETF
GQG Launches its First ETF, GQGU

holdings.infoBox: GQGU is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are AT&T Inc. stock at 6.06%, Verizon Communications at 5.66%, Philip Morris International at 5.55%, Johnson & Johnson at 4.73%, and Altria Group at 4.50%.

overview.description: The GQG US Equity ETF (GQGU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US companies of any market capitalization. The fund predominantly employs a growth investment style. GQGU was launched on Jul 31, 2019 and is issued by GQG Partners.

data.title: It's Rough Out There. But These 5 Funds Are Crushing It.
data.text: Despite the gloomy headlines, market breadth is increasing. More stocks are moving higher.

data.title: GQG Launches its First ETF, GQGU
data.text: Fort Lauderdale, Fla., July 14, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GQG Partners (GQG) today announced the launch of its first exchange-traded fund (ETF), the GQG US Equity ETF (NYSE: GQGU), expanding access of ...
